since_last: 75% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.58%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC +0.40% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 75% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.58%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.58%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.56%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +10.56%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +10.56%, ANET +8.13%, AMD +6.74%, TSLA +6.51%, SOUN +6.41%. Laggards: AVAV -7.36%, SPCX -2.43%, PUBM -2.14%, DDOG -1.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.43% at $158.07
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
